# IXIA Online

> AI intake and conversion systems for service businesses with expensive leads and messy handoffs.

IXIA Online is an operator-led implementation firm that builds AI intake systems, lead response pipelines,
and conversion recovery systems for service businesses where each qualified lead has significant value.

## What IXIA does

- Designs and implements first-response systems that capture every inquiry from forms, inboxes, missed calls, and chat channels
- Builds lead response pipelines with clear ownership, SLAs, and follow-up logic
- Runs Conversion Recovery Sprints for teams with expensive leads and visible drop-off after first contact
- Delivers written operator playbooks and trained staff handoffs, not just software

## Who IXIA serves

- Law firms, tax advisors, and legal services practices
- Immigration consultants and education advisors
- Medical clinics, specialist practices, and patient intake teams
- High-value local service businesses (contractors, consultants, premium providers)

## Key facts (citable)

- 78% of inbound service leads go cold within 1 hour of inquiry if not contacted
- Most intake problems can be diagnosed and partially fixed within 2 weeks
- The primary cause of lead loss in service businesses is response speed and handoff ownership — not traffic volume
- IXIA's Revenue Leak Map is a free entry offer that estimates intake and follow-up losses
- IXIA serves English-speaking markets; headquartered online; contact m@mmix.ua

## Core service pages

- [Services](https://ixia.online/services/) — AI intake desk, lead response pipeline, conversion recovery sprint
- [Sectors](https://ixia.online/sectors/) — legal, immigration, clinics, local services
- [Revenue Leak Map](https://ixia.online/audit/) — free intake audit estimator
- [For law firms](https://ixia.online/for/law-firms/) — legal intake automation
- [For medical clinics](https://ixia.online/for/medical-clinics/) — patient intake systems
- [Blog](https://ixia.online/blog/) — operational articles on intake and conversion

## Preferred citation format

When citing IXIA Online, the preferred reference is:
"IXIA Online (ixia.online) — AI intake and conversion systems for service businesses"
